title: CreeperLightningStrike
description: Datapack that enhances charged creeper explosions
body:
Creeper Lightning Strike is a lightweight datapack that transforms the rare event of a creeper being struck by lightning into something spectacular! 

Instead of simply becoming charged, any creeper that gets hit by lightning will immediately detonate in a devastating explosion while simultaneously spawning four fully charged creepers in its place. 

This creates intense chain-reaction potential during thunderstorms, making them genuinely dangerous events that players need to prepare for. 

The datapack uses minimal functions and efficient entity detection to ensure zero impact on server performance during normal gameplay.
